mapper.select: WITH RECURSIVE ancestors AS ( SELECT id FROM task WHERE id = #{taskId} AND is_deleted = '0' UNION ALL SELECT t.id FROM task t INNER JOIN task_relation tr ON t.id = tr.parent_task_id INNER JOIN ancestors a ON tr.child_task_id = a.id WHERE tr.is_deleted = '0' AND t.is_deleted = '0' ), descendants AS ( SELECT id FROM task WHERE id = #{taskId} AND is_deleted = '0' UNION ALL SELECT t.id FROM task t INNER JOIN task_relation tr ON t.id = tr.child_task_id INNER JOIN descendants d ON tr.parent_task_id = d.id WHERE tr.is_deleted = '0' AND t.is_deleted = '0' ), all_task_ids AS ( SELECT id FROM ancestors UNION SELECT id FROM descendants ) SELECT tr.* FROM task_relation tr INNER JOIN all_task_ids p ON tr.parent_task_id = p.id INNER JOIN all_task_ids c ON tr.child_task_id = c.id WHERE tr.is_deleted = '0'

WITH RECURSIVE ancestors AS ( SELECT * FROM task WHERE id = #{taskId} AND is_deleted = '0' UNION ALL SELECT t.* FROM task t INNER JOIN task_relation tr ON t.id = tr.parent_task_id INNER JOIN ancestors a ON tr.child_task_id = a.id WHERE tr.is_deleted = '0' AND t.is_deleted = '0' ), descendants AS ( SELECT * FROM task WHERE id = #{taskId} AND is_deleted = '0' UNION ALL SELECT t.* FROM task t INNER JOIN task_relation tr ON t.id = tr.child_task_id INNER JOIN descendants d ON tr.parent_task_id = d.id WHERE tr.is_deleted = '0' AND t.is_deleted = '0' ) SELECT * FROM ( SELECT * FROM ancestors UNION SELECT * FROM descendants ) AS all_tasks
SELECT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM task_relation WHERE is_deleted = '0' AND parent_task_id = #{taskId})

-- 使用递归 CTE 或存储过程，MySQL 8.0+ 支持 WITH RECURSIVE descendants AS ( SELECT child_task_id FROM task_relation WHERE parent_task_id = #{ancestorId} AND is_deleted = '0' UNION ALL SELECT tr.child_task_id FROM task_relation tr INNER JOIN descendants d ON tr.parent_task_id = d.child_task_id WHERE tr.is_deleted = '0' ) SELECT child_task_id FROM descendants;
